rationale: B and C independently converge on the decisive structural move — replace the 5–7-way platform <Tabs> matrix with a per-platform SDKs tab — which is the only design that actually fixes P1 (O(platforms) edits per page), kills the 21 "Coming soon" stubs structurally (a page exists only where the feature ships), and fixes the RN-overlays systematic misdocumentation. A's shared-tab-with-exceptions model is cheaper to migrate but leaves the matrix in place and adds a non-deterministic asymmetry ("split only when architecture differs") that an automated pipeline will misapply. So the final IA takes C's skeleton (4 tabs: Docs = concepts + REST workflows; SDKs = per-platform; API Reference; Changelog) because its taxonomy is more consolidated and readable than B's (~55 pages vs ~75): FeedConfig folds into each platform's `feed` page, multi-surface/preload/debugging fold into `advanced`. From B we graft the load-bearing scaling machinery: a closed slug taxonomy per platform (install, feed, playback, widgets, overlays, carousel, live, downloads, ads, recipes, advanced — never extend without updating guidelines), five mechanical placement rules for the docs pipeline, the platform-parity matrix page, and `Since X`/`Unreleased` badge conventions. From A we graft `snippets/versions.mdx` (single edit per release, fixing the 0.2.22/0.3.0 staleness), the canonical `api/webhooks` page (deduping callback/retry docs from upload/import/clip), and the sanctioned `changelog` + `changelog/migrations/*` home that PR #20 proved is needed. Conflicts resolved decisively: no separate `concepts/playback` page (B) — each platform's `playback` page is self-contained; custom feeds get a concept home (`concepts/feeds`) plus a mandatory "Custom feeds" section in each `sdks/{p}/feed` rather than one cross-platform page; per-platform quickstarts fold into `sdks/{p}/install` (ends with a minimal render). API Reference stays structurally intact: new groups and pages are additive; Analytics & Events stays a flat group with new endpoints appended (no nested regroup). Every move gets a `docs.json` redirect and `doc_guidelines.md` is rewritten in lockstep.

pagePlan.detail: Slim to keys + platform cards + minimal render; per-platform install steps replaced by links to sdks/{p}/install; versions sourced from snippets/versions.mdx.
Per-platform install/init pages: sdks/{ios,android,flutter,react-native,web}/install. Init signatures corrected on all platforms (digest section 2). Redirect to sdks/overview.
Type matrix + field tables -> concepts/content-model; custom-feed input + fallback behavior -> concepts/feeds; per-platform struct code -> sdks/{p}/feed custom-feeds sections.

-> content/upload-videos, content/carousels, content/captions-and-metadata, content/webhooks. Duplicated request-field tables and callback events deleted; link API Reference. Internal 'known API quirk' admission removed.
Server lifecycle/broadcast/clips -> content/live-streams (lifecycle 'cannot restart' claim corrected, webrtc token flow added); client surfaces -> sdks/ios/live and sdks/web/live.
-> content/language, canonical. sdk/configuration's duplicate language section deleted.
-> sdks/{p}/feed x5: embed + control (scroll/refresh/filter/lock/deep-link/lifecycle) + custom feeds. Missing description frontmatter fixed in the process. Android page carries no-live caveat.
Init -> sdks/{p}/install; FeedConfig/FeedFilter -> sdks/{p}/feed (corrected Map<String,[String]> OR semantics); language section deleted in favor of content/language.
-> sdks/{p}/playback per platform, each the sole canonical publisher/command table in native units (iOS seconds, Android ms); phantom feedReady removed; Web availability honest.

-> sdks/{ios,flutter,react-native,web}/widgets. Fabricated Kotlin tabs (ShortKitPlayerView/ShortKitWidgetView) deleted — no Android page until shipped. Title/filename collision with sdk/player resolved by the playback/widgets rename.

1307-line page splits -> sdks/{p}/overlays x5 (RN rewritten for props-in/commands-out), sdks/{ios,android}/ads (AdOverlay/NativeAdContent), sdks/{ios,android}/recipes (scrubber + captions tutorials). Embedded ShortKitPlayer/ContentItem tables deleted -> links to playback/content-model.
-> sdks/{ios,react-native}/carousel moved; sdks/android/carousel written new (shipped parity, zero Kotlin docs today). Flutter pending open question.
-> concepts/identity, canonical. Per-platform setUserId snippets stay; analytics recaps become links.
-> analytics/overview (auto-collected metrics, QoE) + analytics/custom-data (customDimensions, sendContentSignal — canonical, collapsing 3 copies). Identity recap deleted.
Orphan (not in docs.json). Roadmap signal moves to Changelog tab; parity truth moves to sdks/overview matrix.

pk/sk endpoint table materially wrong: remove phantom GET /v1/content{,/{id}}, /v1/analytics/*, POST /v1/org/rotate-secret-key; list real pk endpoints (events, identity/resolve, captions, live tokens, feed).
Stays canonical content field source; feed-item-shape notes replaced with link to new api/feed/object.
Keep endpoint docs; callback events/retry section replaced with link to api/webhooks; caption/carousel params cross-link new sub-resource pages.
Document shipped list filters (currently 'coming soon' lie).
Confirm PATCH merge semantics match content/captions-and-metadata guide; cross-link.
Correct lifecycle claim — streams can reactivate after idle; republish guidance.
Callback docs link api/webhooks instead of inlining.

apiAugmentations: New Feed group: api/feed/object — the feed item object (currently only hinted at in api/content/object and api/ad-config/object notes)
New Client runtime group (pk key): POST /v1/events
New Client runtime group: POST /v1/live-streams/{id}/viewer-token (required for documented webrtc protocol)
Content group: carousel images upload endpoint
Content group: carousel image order endpoint
Analytics & Events group (flat, appended — no structural regroup): GET /v1/metrics/{metric}/breakdown
Analytics & Events group: document filters[] param on existing get-metric, get-timeseries, list-events pages
Overview group: new api/webhooks page — canonical callback events + retry semantics (dedupes upload/import/clip)
Fix api/authentication pk/sk table: remove phantom GET /v1/content{,/{id}}, /v1/analytics/*, POST /v1/org/rotate-secret-key
contentWorkItems: Create snippets/versions.mdx with one entry per SDK version line (iOS/Android/RN/Flutter at 0.2.55, Web at 0.5.0); replace all 12 hardcoded version strings; wire release scripts to bump it

Fix init signatures on all four broken platforms in new sdks/{p}/install pages: iOS/Android drop phantom config:/feedItems: params, Android adds required context and correct package, RN moves config prop from ShortKitProvider to <ShortKitFeed>
Correct FeedFilter.metadata to Map<String,[String]> with OR semantics across iOS/Android/RN/Web/API pages; mark Flutter pending 0.3.0 with Unreleased badge

Delete phantom APIs during splits: FeedOverlay.resetPlaybackProgress (iOS/Android), feedReady publisher, RN surveyMode/FeedItem/SurveyItem/AdSlot/ContentItem.isLive, Flutter SurveyMode/VTTCue, Web player.setItem/widget.setItems/scrollAxis, fabricated Kotlin player-and-widget tabs
Replace shipped-feature 'Coming soon' stubs with real docs: Flutter ShortKitPlayer/ShortKitWidget, Flutter carousel overlays, content list filters, client-upload guide, six RN widget props
Correct live-stream lifecycle claims (reactivation after idle re-publishes); add webrtc viewer-token flow to content/live-streams
Add missing description frontmatter (sdk/feed) and remove the 'known API quirk we plan to reconcile' internal admission from upload-pipeline content during migration
Define and apply Since X / Unreleased badge conventions on sdks/overview; apply to Flutter 0.3.0-pending surface and the lone 'since 0.2.36' note
Standardize platform naming (iOS/Android/Flutter/React Native/Web) in all group labels and page titles; no platform <Tabs> anywhere outside API-language tabs (cURL/Python/Node)

Add full redirects block to docs.json for every moved/split URL; rewrite doc_guidelines.md nav section, code-example rules (SDK tabs rule replaced by per-platform-page rule), and edit-vs-create rules to the five mechanical placement rules in lockstep
Vendor-name hygiene check on all newly written RN/Web/live content (streaming vendor, image-library names from source comments must not propagate)
openQuestions: Does the Flutter carousel runtime control surface (sdk.carousel namespace) actually ship today? Determines whether sdks/flutter/carousel is created now or waits for 0.3.0.
Web SDK versions independently and is absent from VERSIONS.md and release tooling — who owns bumping the web entry in snippets/versions.mdx on web releases?
Approve the migration scale: every Docs-tab URL moves (full redirects block, doc_guidelines.md rewrite). Ship big-bang or phase (SDKs tab first, Docs-tab reshuffle second)?
Analytics & Events kept flat per the 'API tab structurally as-is' constraint; with 15 pages it gets long — may we use nested Metrics/Views/Events/Dimensions subgroups, or is flat firm?

Exact paths for client-runtime live endpoints (viewer-token/publisher-token/start) and content sub-resources (carousel create, finalize, create-shell) need verification against the API router before page creation.
